whats_new.title: Cloud Sync Embedding
whats_new.subtitle: Load sessions directly from Dropbox, Google Drive, or a local sync folder — no CSV export needed

whats_new.title: Collision Protection
whats_new.subtitle: Files with identical UCS names are auto-numbered (_002, _003) — no more accidental overwrites

whats_new.title: Library Organizer
whats_new.subtitle: Organize embedded files into UCS folder structures on your studio drive
